note: Manually curated. Update after each significant policy event or macro shift.

sectors.rationale_zh: 政策持续支持算力投资，国产替代加速，北向资金系统性流入AI算力板块
sectors.rationale_en: Policy supports compute capex; domestic substitution accelerating; northbound systematically accumulating AI names

sectors.rationale_zh: 反垄断压力边际缓和，但广告景气度与消费复苏挂钩，宏观能见度有限
sectors.rationale_en: Anti-monopoly pressure easing at margin; ad cycle tied to consumer recovery — macro visibility limited

sectors.rationale_zh: 医保谈判压力持续，海外BD交易活跃但兑现节奏不确定；关注NMPA加速审批信号
sectors.rationale_en: NRDL pricing pressure persists; overseas BD active but timing uncertain; watch for NMPA expedited approval signals

sectors.rationale_zh: 出口增长超预期，政府以旧换新补贴持续，竞争格局向头部集中利好龙头
sectors.rationale_en: Export growth beating estimates; trade-in subsidies ongoing; competitive consolidation favours leaders

sectors.rationale_zh: 内需复苏斜率低于预期，消费者信心仍弱；关注五一假期数据验证
sectors.rationale_en: Domestic demand recovery below expectations; consumer confidence still fragile; watch May Golden Week data

sectors.rationale_zh: 净息差压力触底，险资举牌活动增加；但地产敞口风险尚未完全出清
sectors.rationale_en: NIM pressure bottoming; insurance buyouts increasing; property exposure risk not fully cleared
